title: Raccoon Removal in Longwood, Bronx | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Longwood, Bronx. Licensed experts safely remove raccoons from homes and buildings. Call Best Pest Control NYC today for fast service!
intro: Raccoons are a growing problem in Longwood, where these clever animals find shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces of both residential homes and multi-family buildings. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout the Longwood neighborhood, ensuring safe and humane removal with prices ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges posed by Longwood's dense housing and are equipped to handle any raccoon situation quickly and effectively.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Longwood residents for years with fast, reliable, and humane raccoon removal services. Our licensed technicians are available 24/7, offer same-day service, and provide complete solutions including removal, cleanup, and exclusion work to prevent future raccoon problems in your Longwood property.
localContext: Longwood's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, single-family homes near Southern Boulevard, and properties close to Longwood Avenue create numerous entry points for raccoons seeking shelter and food. The proximity to local parks and the tree-lined streets in the neighborhood provide ideal habitats for raccoons, making professional removal services essential for protecting your property and family.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Longwood, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Longwood typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on factors such as the number of raccoons, location of the nest, extent of damage, and whether babies are present. A thorough inspection allows us to provide an accurate quote for your specific situation.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to Longwood residents?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can be dangerous as they may carry rabies, roundworm, and other diseases. They can also become aggressive when cornered or protecting their young. Additionally, raccoons cause significant property damage by tearing insulation, chewing wires, and contaminating areas with feces and urine, making professional removal essential.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Longwood property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency raccoon removal services in Longwood. Most removal projects are completed within 1-3 days, though cases involving babies or multiple animals may take longer. We work efficiently to remove raccoons humanely while ensuring they cannot re-enter your property.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees for raccoon removal in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC provides warranties on our raccoon exclusion work. After removing the raccoons, we seal all entry points and vulnerable areas to prevent re-entry. If raccoons return due to our exclusion work, we will address the issue at no additional charge during the warranty period.
